# All init variants install integrations or print the shell script.

# No-arg init -> vessel init (--yes skips TUI, installs all)
exec orbiter init --yes
stdout 'Installed [0-9]+ integration\(s\)'

# Explicit vessel target
exec orbiter init vessel --yes
stdout 'Installed [0-9]+ integration\(s\)'

# Via vessel subcommand alias
exec orbiter vessel init --yes
stdout 'Installed [0-9]+ integration\(s\)'

# Shell target via init (set BASH_VERSION so bash detection fires)
env BASH_VERSION=5.2.0
exec orbiter init shell
stdout 'function orbiter'

# Shell subcommand route
exec orbiter shell init
stdout 'function orbiter'

# Unknown target is an error
! exec orbiter init badtarget
stderr 'unknown init target'
